titleStmt.title: SII 23.487: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 487. (A.R. No. 487 of 1907.) Kuttālam, Mayuram Taluk, Tanjavur District Uttaravēdīśvara temple—on the east wall of the central shrine Rājēndra-Chōḷa I: year 8: 1020-21 A.D.

summary.p: The inscription begins with introduction Tirumanni vaḷara etc. This registers a sale of half vēli of land (made tax-free) by the sabhā of Villavaṉmahādēvi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam a brahmadēya in Tiruvaḻundūr-nāḍu to the temple of Tirukkaṟṟaḷi-Mahādēva at Vīṅgunīr-Tirutturutti for 45 kāśu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉivaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum poṟceyappāvaiyuñ cirttaniccelviyun tan perunteviyarāki Iṉpuṟa neṭu tuyalūḻiyuḷiṭai tuṟaināṭum tuṭarvaṉavelippaṭar vaṉavāciyum cuḷḷi
ccūḻ matiḷ(ṭ)koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟ karumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakka mum porukaṭariḻattaraicar tam muṭiyum Āṅkavar teviyar Oṅkeḻil muṭiyum munnavar pakkal tenṉavaṉ vaiytta cuntaramuṭiyum Intiraṉāra mum
teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaikkeraḷan muṟaimaiyil cūṭum kulataṉamākiya palar pukaḻmuṭiyumceṅkatir mālaiyum caṅkatir velait tol peruṅkāval palapaḻantivum
ceruviṟ ciṉavil Irupattorukā laraicukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ mevaruñ cāntimaṟṟivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyum māp porutaṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakecaripanmarāna rājentracoḻatevaṟ ku yāṇṭu 8Āvatu
Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭuttiruvaḻuntūr nāṭṭu brahmadeyam villavaṉ māhātevi caturvetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyom viṟṟukkuṭutta nilavilai yāvaṇam Inṉāṭṭut tevatānam
viṅ kunirt tirutturuttit tirukkaṟṟaḷi mahādevar caṇṭeśvaradevaṟku nāṅka ḷiṟaiyiliyāka viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷūr vaṭavūrañcalāṟ ṟiṉ kiḻai mukkāleṉṟu perkūvappaṭu
m nilattil nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭukkiṉṟa nilattukkuk kiḻpāṟkellai Olo ccaṉ nantikulakālanum māppāni kāḷi nākanum pālāḻriyaṉ nākaṉ marutaṉ nilattukkum meṟku teṉpāṟke
llai kaṇṇuvaṉ tattaṉ nakulaṉum tampiyum nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Eṅkaḷ piṇam pokum peruvaḻi vāykkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Attāṇivāyk
kālukku teṟkum Ivvicaitta perunāṉkellaiyuḷḷum Akappaṭṭa nilam kuḻi Ulakaḷanta kolāl nūṟu kuḻi koṇṭatu Oru māvāka vanta kuḻi Āyiratti(ṉ)nāl van=ta nilam I Inilaṉ
Araiyum Iṟai dravyattukku Iṟaikāvalukkum Idevarpaṇṭārattu caṇṭeśvaradevar śrīhastattāl koṇṭa kācu Aṉṟāṭu nalkācu 4 10 5 Ik kācu 4 10 5- kkum Iṟaiyi
li ceytu viṟṟukkuṭutta nilaṉ Arai Inni tirukkoṟṟavācalil ponta kuṭimaiyum Iṟaiyum Eyccoṟum kūṟṟarici nirveṭṭi yuḷpaṭṭa EpSome portion lost before line 12.
ricaṉṟi Itaṟṟiṟampil tanmāsaṉamutalāka tām veṇṭuvatu Iṟaiyili māheśvara ṟap peṟuvarākavum I
pparicoṭṭi vilaikkaṟa viṟṟu poruḷaṟak koṇṭu Inilaṉ Araiyum cantrātittavaṟ nāṅkaḷe Iṟaiyiṟuppataṟku Iṟaiyi
liyāka viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇam ceytukuṭuttom viṅkunir tirut turutti tirukkaṟṟaḷi mahādevar kanmikaḷ caṇṭeśvaradevaṟku
villavaṉ māhadevi caturvetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyom sabhaik kuṟi Iruntu paṇippaṇiyālp paṇikeṭṭu Eḻutiṉeṉ
Ivūr maddhyasthaṉ Eḻupattaiyvaṉ tāḻiyāṉa Alaṅkārapriyaṉeṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 23.487 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
